experience.description: Led the development of enterprise-grade BI dashboards, built automation pipelines, and delivered AI-powered analytics solutions across the diagnostics business.
achievements: Delivered 15+ Power BI and Tableau dashboards for executive and operational stakeholders
Reduced dashboard refresh time by 50% through query optimization and data modeling
Automated 80% of recurring reports, saving hundreds of analyst hours monthly
Built AI-powered CCTV analytics solution using YOLO and OpenCV for facility monitoring
Designed and implemented KPI frameworks aligned with organizational strategic goals
Led UAT sessions and gathered requirements from C-suite and department heads
Processed thousands of diagnostic records daily through automated ETL pipelines
Achieved 35% faster report delivery through process optimization and automation

experience.description: Began analytics journey at one of India's leading diagnostics chains — built foundational dashboards, conducted data analysis, and contributed to business intelligence initiatives.
achievements: Built first set of operational dashboards tracking lab throughput and patient volumes
Conducted root cause analysis on reporting inefficiencies, identifying 25% efficiency improvement opportunities
Supported requirement gathering sessions with department managers
Wrote complex SQL queries for ad-hoc analytical requests
Contributed to SOP documentation for data workflows
Learned healthcare data standards and diagnostics domain knowledge
